source.description: Built-in image generation contact sheet reviewed before cropping; approved final panel is saved as the finished marker doodle artwork.
source.notes: All step frames should be cropped from the same generated contact sheet so the triangle slice, crust, face, pepperoni, cheese stretch, marker fills, and shadow stay consistent.

process_strategy: Use one six-panel marker contact sheet that builds the pizza slice from a triangle guide to a bold black outline, crust band, smiling face, toppings, cheese stretch, saturated marker fill, and final outline strength.

final_elements.name: triangle pizza slice
final_elements.description: A wide-topped triangular pizza slice pointing downward.

final_elements.name: rounded crust band
final_elements.description: A puffy rounded crust along the top edge of the slice.

final_elements.name: bold black marker outline
final_elements.description: Thick handmade black felt-tip edges around the slice and crust.

final_elements.name: smiling face
final_elements.description: Two simple eyes and a small cheerful mouth on the cheese area.

final_elements.name: pepperoni circles
final_elements.description: A few round pepperoni marks spaced around the face.

final_elements.name: cheese stretch
final_elements.description: One small drooping cheese pull near the lower edge of the slice.

final_elements.name: yellow cheese fill
final_elements.description: Saturated yellow marker fill with visible streaks.

final_elements.name: orange crust fill
final_elements.description: Warm orange-brown marker fill across the crust band.

final_elements.name: red pepperoni fill
final_elements.description: Red marker fill inside the pepperoni circles.

frames.visible_job: Sets the wide triangle pizza slice guide with a soft lower point.
Adds the puffy crust band across the top of the triangle.
Strengthens the triangle and crust with a bold black marker contour.
Adds the smiling face and pepperoni circles before any marker fill.
Adds the cheese stretch plus yellow cheese, orange crust, and red pepperoni marker fill.

final_step.visible_job: Only deepens the existing black outline and marker color fills without adding new toppings, face parts, or lettering.
allowed_changes: paper and marker texture from the saved contact sheet

rejection_checks: No extra toppings, arms, legs, lettering, plate, table, background props, or new face parts should appear in the final only.
The slice must keep the same triangle pose, crust placement, face placement, and topping layout in every frame.
The color step should look like marker fill, not colored pencil, watercolor, or airbrush.
The final panel must read as a handmade marker doodle, not a clean vector icon.
